about_panache_homes: Panache Homes helps international investors buy and manage Dubai property.
buying_fees: AED 3000 Oqood Fee for Off-Plan Purchases
taxes: US citizens should consult their CPA regarding foreign asset reporting.
currency: UAE Dirham is pegged to USD
USD investors carry no currency risk.
golden_visa: AED 2 Million property investment qualifies for UAE 10-Year Golden Visa.
remote_purchase: Customers can complete the purchase remotely through Digital Signing, International Wire Transfer, and Power of Attorney.

Dubai Marina.description: High rental demand from expats, yacht access, waterfront skyscrapers.

Palm Jumeirah.description: Waterfront villas, beach access, luxury hotels and resorts.
Palm Jumeirah.payment_plans: Premium payment schedules are available for off-plan beachfront signature villas.

Downtown Dubai.description: Burj Khalifa views, luxury skyscrapers, tourism and retail center.
